classification.reason: may contain milk claim found in supporting source

ingredients.rawText: Vongole (7,2%), calamari (6,4%), gamberetti (3,2%), pomodoro, olio di oliva, aglio, prezzemolo, vino bianco. Puo contenere latte, frutta a guscio, arachidi, soia, uova, sedano e pesce. Senza glutine.

sources.name: Deco product information gathered during review

notes: Displayed severity in the app was SAFE, but supporting product information reports may contain milk.
Record is supported rather than verified because the milk trace warning was not confirmed from a readable packaging ingredient photo in this review.
